title: Tetris
platform_style_description: Game Boy aesthetic, green monochrome palette, crisp pixel forms, portable mood, and very clean value separation
main_subject: a nearly complete wall of interlocking blocks with one falling piece above a tight gap
environment: a tall glowing playfield seen head-on like a handheld puzzle screen in the dark
action_mood_cue: caught one instant before the final drop locks into place
composition: single vertical playfield, one falling piece, no isometric explosion, no extra decoration
memory_hook: falling rhythm, spatial pressure, and instant readability
legal_watchouts: avoid official block arrangements from known promo art
legal_notes: Risk level: high. Use generic archetypes, avoid franchise-identifiable costume or symbol language, and preserve recognizability through atmosphere, scene memory, and gameplay cues only.
prompt:
Original illustration inspired by a retro Puzzle game.

A nearly complete wall of interlocking blocks with one falling piece above a tight gap in a tall glowing playfield seen head-on like a handheld puzzle screen in the dark, caught one instant before the final drop locks into place.

Visual focus:
- one clear subject
- strong silhouette
- readable in 1 second
- exactly one primary focal subject
- no crowd, no collage, no multi-character scene

Style:
- Game Boy aesthetic, green monochrome palette, crisp pixel forms, portable mood, and very clean value separation
- pixel art or stylized rendering depending on platform
- clean and modern interpretation of retro limitations
- limited color palette when relevant

Mood:
- focused, clean, hypnotic

Composition:
- single vertical playfield, one falling piece, no isometric explosion, no extra decoration
- simple background
- no clutter

Important:
- Do NOT replicate any official character, logo, or design
- Do NOT imitate exact game assets
- Must feel original but clearly inspired by the game's genre and atmosphere

Output:
- high clarity
- strong contrast
- minimal noise
- no text
- no watermark
negative_prompt: no official character likeness, no logo, no box art recreation, no screenshot recreation, no UI elements, no sprite rip, no direct copy of official costume or weapon design, no franchise text, no watermark, avoid official block arrangements from known promo art, avoid branded UI framing, avoid floating cube sculpture compositions, avoid resemblance to tetris

generation_notes.preferred_render_mode: illustrative pixel art or stylized retro render
generation_notes.detail_policy: rich enough to feel desirable, simple enough to read fast
